info.name: CyberFrost Backend API
info.description:
## CyberFrost Backend API

Preemptive ETLM Platform -- Auth, Discovery, Intelligence, OSINT, Notifications, Action & Mitigation, AI Service.

### Usage

1. **Set Environment Variables**
   - `baseUrl`: `http://localhost:4000` (API Gateway)
   - `token`: (auto-set after login via test scripts)

2. **Recommended Test Flow**
   - **Auth** -> Register or Login (token auto-saves)
   - **Discovery** -> Start scan, check results
   - **Intelligence** -> View dashboard, list CVEs
   - **OSINT** -> Start OSINT scan, view leaks
   - **AI Service** -> Generate AI insights
   - **Notifications** -> Send test notification, view list
   - **Action & Mitigation** -> Submit takedown, block IP

> All endpoints except Auth register/login and Health require `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}`.

item.name: Health
item.description: Health check endpoints for monitoring service availability.

item.name: Auth
item.description: Multi-tenant authentication. Register creates a company + admin user. Login returns JWT access and refresh tokens.

item.name: Organization
item.description: Organization (Tenant) management. Create and manage organizations/tenants via the auth system.

item.name: Discovery
item.description: Attack Surface Discovery -- Subdomain enumeration, port scanning, and asset discovery using BullMQ for async processing.

item.name: EASM (Discovery)
item.description: External Attack Surface Management -- Shadow IT, digital footprint, misconfiguration detection.

item.name: Intelligence
item.description: Vulnerability Intelligence (CVE) and Threat Intelligence. Supports pagination, severity filtering, and search.

item.name: Threat Actors (Intel)
item.description: Threat actor profiling, MITRE ATT&CK mapping, and campaign tracking.

item.name: OSINT
item.description: Dark Web Monitoring and Brand Protection. Detects data leaks on pastebin, dark web forums, typo-squatting domains, and social media impersonation.

item.name: Notifications
item.description: Real-time notification management. Notifications are delivered via Socket.io to the frontend and via email to admins.

item.name: Action & Mitigation
item.description: Takedown requests, firewall blocking, incident tickets, webhooks, and workflow automation.

item.name: AI Service
item.description: AI-powered threat analysis, summarization, early warning, rule generation, and semantic search.
